platforms.name: Mercari
platforms.shipping: Built-in anonymous shipping (Mercari Shipping). Seller or buyer pays.
platforms.note: Largest flea market app in Japan. English app interface available. Listings in Japanese get more views.

platforms.name: Yahoo Auctions (Yahoo! Flea Market)
platforms.shipping: Seller arranges. Yahoo Neko Pak (Yamato) or Yahoo Yu Pack (Japan Post) available.
platforms.note: Best for auctions on rare/valuable items. Japanese-only interface. Requires Yahoo Japan ID.

platforms.name: Jimoty
platforms.shipping: Local pickup only (buyer comes to you)
platforms.note: Best option for large items. Many listings are free (0 yen). Buyer picks up, so no shipping hassle. Japanese only.

platforms.name: Hard Off
platforms.shipping: Bring items to store, or request pickup for large items
platforms.note: Walk-in secondhand chain. Bring items for instant cash quote. Low buyback prices but zero hassle. 900+ stores nationwide.

platforms.name: 2nd Street
platforms.shipping: Bring items to store, or request pickup for large items
platforms.note: GEO Group chain. Strong on fashion and brand goods. Walk in for instant quote. 800+ stores nationwide.

platforms.name: Book Off
platforms.note: Walk-in chain for books, media, and clothing. Very low buyback prices but accepts almost anything. 800+ stores.
